resources.string: Shown while TeleForward is listening for action buttons you press in Telegram.
Buttons you press in Telegram act on this device.
✍️ Reply to this message and I\'ll send it from your phone.
Reply to the forwarded message and I\'ll send it
These buttons were replaced — use the newest message
TeleForward stopped listening mid-press — try again
Something went wrong handling that press
⚠️ That message has no reply action — this app doesn\'t accept replies from here.
Couldn\'t tell which chat that press came from
TeleForward isn\'t paired with a chat — re-pair it in Settings
Notification is no longer on the device
That action is no longer available
⚠️ That notification is gone — can\'t reply to it any more
⚠️ That chat can\'t be replied to from here

⏳ That press reached me too late for Telegram to show the result on the button.

Result: %1$s

Why: the button was pressed while TeleForward wasn't listening. It checks Telegram for a few minutes after each forward, then a few more times over the next couple of hours — a press outside those windows waits for the next check.
To make presses act immediately: Settings → Remote actions → “Always listening”.

⚠️ I couldn't show the result on the button.

Result: %1$s
Reason: %2$s
